Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: Add anatomical variability analysis — bowel involvement drives outliers (#56)

74-case dataset characterization with 46 features (structure volumes, PTV-OAR
proximity, dose complexity, DICOM PTV targets). Spearman correlations identify
bowel volume (rho=-0.96 vs global gamma) and z-extent (rho=0.96 vs PTV gamma)
as strongest error predictors. Cross-seed ICC confirms anatomy > randomness
(MAE ICC=0.66). Case 0065 is a multivariate outlier. All findings
hypothesis-generating (n=7 test cases).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add structured user logging to all handlers

Added handlers/utils.py with:
- user_tag(user) → '[id | @username | Fullname]'
- short(text, limit=80) → truncate for log readability

Log format per handler:
- /start    → [user] /start
- /news     → [user] /news → запрос / ← OK (N chars) / ← ОШИБКА
- /weather  → [user] /weather city="..." / coords=(lat, lon) / ← OK/TIMEOUT/ОШИБКА
- /ai       → [user] /ai → "запрос..." / ← "ответ..."
- /clear    → [user] /clear — история очищена
- fallback  → [user] fallback: "текст..."

commit.message:
Fix map colors: rename val to value for Highcharts color axis

hcmap() internally renames the value column to 'value' before passing
to Highcharts, which uses 'value' as the default colorKey. Our direct
hc_add_series() call skipped this rename, so all countries showed
with no color. Now explicitly rename val -> value in the series data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add anti-cognitive-debt safeguards to workflow rules

Add Comprehension Gate (3-question check before merging AI code),
AI Code Ownership rules for commit/PR documentation, and a Never Do
item for unexplainable AI-generated code. Inspired by cognitive debt
video analysis — speed without understanding is borrowed velocity.

commit.message:
Fix empty-file dedup, corrupt ZIP on delete-source, scan progress logging, mise syntax

- hash_file returns None for 0-byte files so they are not falsely deduplicated
  against each other (blake3 of empty bytes is a fixed value shared by all
  empty files regardless of type or location)
- delete-source no longer errors on corrupt archives: remove_chunks now skips
  archives that fail ZipArchive::new with a warning, matching the same guard
  already present in current_archive_path
- Periodic progress log now fires for indexed files as well as skipped files,
  showing current batch accumulation count every 5 seconds
- .mise/tasks/release: update # mise header to #MISE to fix deprecation warning

fixes) are compiled and active at runtime.

commit.message:
refactor(chat): scope messaging to conversations instead of workspaces

Refactor SendMessage, ListMessages, and StreamMessages to operate on
conversation IDs rather than workspace IDs. Update protobuf definitions,
pub/sub channels, message entity, Postgres queries, gRPC handlers, and
WebSocket handler to subscribe to all user conversations on connect.

feat: add interactive mode when targets.txt is missing

When targets.txt is absent, prompt the user to export all conversations,
interactively select via a curses-based checklist, or exit. Also adds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: SOQL Explorer lookup/relationship fields now display values

Relationship fields (e.g. Account__r.Name, Owner.Email) were showing
empty values and incorrect column labels. Root cause: buildColumns()
used getPopulatedFieldsAsMap() which returns relationship objects as
single keys, not nested field paths.

Apex: buildColumns() now recursively traverses nested SObjects for
dot-notation columns. Cursor path uses new buildColumnsFromMap() that
parses raw JSON maps directly (more reliable than SObject deserialization).

JS: Records flattened once on arrival (not per-render) into dot-notation
keys matching the column definitions.

commit.message:
feat: observability — Prometheus metrics, aletheia status CLI (#494)

## Summary

- **OBS-01:** `GET /metrics` Prometheus endpoint — HTTP, pipeline, LLM,
tool, and system metrics with LazyLock statics per crate, global
registry coordination, and path normalization middleware
- **OBS-03:** `aletheia status` CLI command — gateway health, nous
actors, disk storage with colored terminal output and graceful offline
fallback

## Metrics registered

| Category | Metrics |
|----------|---------|
| HTTP | `aletheia_http_requests_total{method,path,status}`,
`aletheia_http_request_duration_seconds{method,path}` |
| Pipeline | `aletheia_pipeline_turns_total{nous_id}`,
`aletheia_pipeline_stage_duration_seconds{nous_id,stage}`,
`aletheia_pipeline_errors_total{nous_id,stage,error_type}` |
| LLM | `aletheia_llm_tokens_total{provider,direction}`,
`aletheia_llm_cost_total{provider}`,
`aletheia_llm_requests_total{provider,status}` |
| Tools | `aletheia_tool_invocations_total{tool_name,status}`,
`aletheia_tool_duration_seconds{tool_name}` |
| System | `aletheia_active_sessions`, `aletheia_uptime_seconds` |

## Test plan

- [x] Zero clippy warnings (`cargo clippy --workspace --exclude
aletheia-mneme-engine --all-targets -- -D warnings`)
- [x] All 753 tests pass (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Manual: `curl http://localhost:18789/metrics` returns Prometheus
text format
- [ ] Manual: `aletheia status` shows formatted output
- [ ] Manual: `aletheia status` with pylon down shows disk-only info

---------

Co-authored-by: admin <admin@ardentleatherworks.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
#590 Fix split-message audio race condition: save to DB before send

When a response is split into parts via [MENSAJE_DIVIDIDO], the audio
part was saved to DB AFTER send_audio_message() returned. This caused
db_update_last_assistant_to_audio() to update the WRONG message (from
a previous turn), leaving the current message with message_type='audio'
but media_url=null — making the audio unplayable in the dashboard.

Fix: save each part to DB as 'text' BEFORE sending. If audio succeeds,
_save_audio_to_db() promotes it to 'audio' with the Cloudinary URL.
If audio fails, the message stays as 'text' (correct fallback).

Also captures wa_msg_id for text parts in split messages, fixing
delivery_status staying as 'pending' forever.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix media upload failure: add per-JID lock and retry for images

Root cause: Baileys could fire messages.upsert twice for the same
message, causing concurrent sendMessage calls that race on the same
/tmp/ encrypted media file (ENOENT error).

Changes:
- Add per-JID conversation lock (locksConversa) so messages from the
  same user are processed sequentially, preventing /tmp file races
- Add retry logic (2 attempts + 1s delay) for media uploads
- Graceful fallback: if image upload still fails, send caption as text
- Clean up orphaned locks in periodic cache sweep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: don't abort import SSE on component unmount

The import fetch was being aborted when OfficePage unmounted during
the loading→initialized transition. Since import is fire-and-forget
on the server, the SSE connection should not be aborted.

Fix infinite cleanup loop, silent bot, and CSP issues

- voice.ts: Better playback abort handling during cleanup
